text: Any trailer which is so designed that when operated the forward end of its body or chassis rests upon the body or chassis of the towing vehicle.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 1
#### Article 1. Words & Phrases Defined
##### § 143 — Semitrailer

Any trailer which is so designed that when operated the forward end of its body or chassis rests upon the body or chassis of the towing vehicle.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: Any trailer which is so designed that when operated the forward end of its body or chassis rests upon the body or chassis of the towing vehicle.
